
            INSERT INTO dara_mallas_subject_rule
                (period_id, subject_id, area_id, company_id)
            SELECT
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_period WHERE name = '000000' AND company_id=4),
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_subject WHERE code = 'HSHM0001' AND company_id=4),
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_area WHERE code = '020-C01' AND company_id=4),
                4
            WHERE NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_subject_rule sr
                WHERE sr.period_id = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_period WHERE name = '000000' AND company_id=4)
                AND sr.subject_id = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_subject WHERE code = 'HSHM0001' AND company_id=4)
                AND sr.area_id   = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_area WHERE code = '020-C01' AND company_id=4)
            );


                
            insert into dara_mallas_homologation
            (homologation_subject_id, subject_attributes_id, group_id, condition, test, min_score, max_score, rule_min_score_id, subject_rule_id, subject_rule_subject_id, company_id)
            values (
                (select id from dara_mallas_subject where code = 'HSHM0001' and company_id=4),
                NULL,
                (select id from dara_mallas_group_rule where name = 'A-100' and company_id=4),
                NULL, --condition
                NULL, --test
                NULL, --min_score
                NULL, --max_score
                NULL, --rule_min_score_id
                (select id from dara_mallas_subject_rule where 
                    period_id = (select id from dara_mallas_period where name = '000000' and company_id=4) and 
                    subject_id = (select id from dara_mallas_subject where code = 'HSHM0001' and company_id=4) and
                    area_id = (select id from dara_mallas_area where code = '020-C01' and company_id=4)
                ), --subject_rule_id
                NULL, --subject_rule_subject_id
                4);

                NULL, --condition
                NULL, --test
                NULL, --min_score
                NULL, --max_score
                NULL, --rule_min_score_id
                (select id from dara_mallas_subject_rule where 
                    period_id = (select id from dara_mallas_period where name = '000000' and company_id=4) and 
                    subject_id = (select id from dara_mallas_subject where code = 'ECTE6110' and company_id=4) and
                    area_id = (select id from dara_mallas_area where code = 'L554-M9' and company_id=4)
                ), --subject_rule_id
                NULL, --subject_rule_subject_id
                4);
 --company_id
        
            INSERT INTO dara_mallas_subject_rule
                (period_id, subject_id, area_id, company_id)
            SELECT
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_period WHERE name = '000000' AND company_id=4),
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_subject WHERE code = 'ECTE6111' AND company_id=4),
                (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_area WHERE code = 'L554-M10' AND company_id=4),
                4
            WHERE NOT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1
                FROM dara_mallas_subject_rule sr
                WHERE sr.period_id = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_period WHERE name = '000000' AND company_id=4)
                AND sr.subject_id = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_subject WHERE code = 'ECTE6111' AND company_id=4)
                AND sr.area_id   = (SELECT id FROM dara_mallas_area WHERE code = 'L554-M10' AND company_id=4)
            );


                
            insert into dara_mallas_homologation
            (homologation_subject_id, subject_attributes_id, group_id, condition, test, min_score, max_score, rule_min_score_id, subject_rule_id, subject_rule_subject_id, company_id)
            values (
                (select id from dara_mallas_subject where code = 'ECTE6111' and company_id=4),
                NULL,
                (select id from dara_mallas_group_rule where name = 'A-100' and company_id=4),
                NULL, --condition
                NULL, --test
                NULL, --min_score
                NULL, --max_score
                NULL, --rule_min_score_id
                (select id from dara_mallas_subject_rule where 
                    period_id = (select id from dara_mallas_period where name = '000000' and company_id=4) and 
                    subject_id = (select id from dara_mallas_subject where code = 'ECTE6111' and company_id=4) and
                    area_id = (select id from dara_mallas_area where code = 'L554-M10' and company_id=4)
                ), --subject_rule_id
                NULL, --subject_rule_subject_id
                4);
 --company_id
